positive: A stylized and vibrant depiction of a cosmic forest grove, featuring massive bioluminescent mushrooms, ethereal glowing roots, and delicate, geometric crystalline flora. The main focus is a serene, stylized celestial stag silhouette standing among the glowing elements. Use a synthwave vaporwave aesthetic combined with neo-art nouveau organic elements. Strong contrast between deep indigo and brilliant neon turquoise/magenta glows. Central composition, clean lines, and excellent detail suitable for direct apparel printing. Minimalistic negative space.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, noise, text, watermarks, logos, trademarks, poor anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, bad symmetry, copyright, dirty, grime, messy, cluttered
